allow: Bash(node -e "const {chromium}=require\('playwright'\); \(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\({args:['--no-sandbox']}\);const p=await b.newPage\(\);await p.setViewportSize\({width:1400,height:900}\);await p.goto\('http://localhost:5173',{waitUntil:'networkidle'}\);await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\);await p.evaluate\(\(\)=>document.querySelector\('#clients'\).scrollIntoView\(\)\);await p.waitForTimeout\(1000\);await p.screenshot\({path:'/tmp/ind.png'}\);await b.close\(\);console.log\('done'\);}\)\(\)")
